eyebrow.es: Breakout de alfabetización en IA generativa · Grado 2
eyebrow.vi: Breakout hiểu biết AI tạo sinh · Lớp 2
eyebrow.ar: تحدّي الثقافة في الذكاء الاصطناعي التوليدي · الصف 2
eyebrow.ur: جنریٹو اے آئی خواندگی بریک آؤٹ · جماعت 2
eyebrow.zh: 生成式AI素养破解 · 二 年级

chrome.sub: An AI helper guesses from what you say. If you say it clearly, you get a better answer. Open four locks to become a clear asker.
chrome.briefP: An AI helper is a computer helper that makes guesses. It guesses from the words you give it. Read the clues, then open all four locks. Each lock has a reason that shows why the answer is right.
chrome.footerText: Gen AI Literacy Breakouts · Runs entirely in your browser — no logins, no data collected.
chrome.winP: You learned that an AI helper guesses from your words, that a clear ask gets a better answer, and that fuzzy words get a fuzzy guess. It can still be wrong, so you check. Great work!

clues.title: How it guesses
clues.body: An AI helper is a computer helper that makes guesses. It reads the words you give it, then guesses an answer that matches your words.

clues.title: A fuzzy ask
clues.body: If you say only "make something," the AI helper does not know what you want. A fuzzy ask gets a fuzzy guess that may not fit.

clues.title: A clear ask
clues.body: If you say "draw a happy blue fish in the sea," the AI helper knows exactly what you mean. A clear ask gets a better answer.

clues.title: Say more
clues.body: Details help. Tell the AI helper the color, the size, or the place. The more clear details you add, the closer the answer will be.

clues.title: It can be wrong
clues.body: Even a clear ask can get a wrong answer, because the AI helper is still guessing. So you read the answer and check it every time.

clues.title: A buzzy fact
clues.body: A bee can visit many flowers in one day to gather nectar. That is neat, but it will not open a lock.

locks.title: What Helps Most
locks.q: What helps an AI helper give you a better answer?
options: Telling it clearly what you want
Using fuzzy words it cannot understand
Saying nothing at all and hoping
locks.reason: An AI helper guesses from your words. When you tell it clearly what you want, it can give a better answer. Fuzzy words or no words lead to a fuzzy guess.

locks.title: Clear Asks
locks.q: Tap EVERY ask that is clear enough for a good answer.

items.t: Draw a red kite flying in a blue sky
Write a short poem about my puppy
Make a list of three fruits that are green
Just make a thing for me
Do something, I do not care what

locks.reason: Clear asks name what you want, like a red kite or a poem about a puppy. Fuzzy asks like "make a thing" do not tell the AI helper enough to guess well.

locks.title: The Magic Word
locks.q: To get a better answer, you must tell the AI helper what you want in a ______ way.
locks.reason: A clear ask helps the AI helper make a better guess. When your words are clear, its answer fits what you really want.

locks.title: Ask the Right Way
locks.q: You want the AI helper to draw a picture. Tap the steps in the RIGHT order.
locks.reason: First THINK about what you want. Then ASK in clear words. Then CHECK the answer, because the AI helper can still be wrong.
